qualifications.name: Bachelor of Commerce
notes: Minimum certificate type: National Senior Certificate Bachelor's degree pass.
Meeting the minimum requirements does not guarantee admission; final selection depends on places, academic results and other entry requirements.
School: School of Business Sciences.
Fields: General; Politics, Philosophy and Economics; Information Systems.
Waitlisting: eligible: True; criteria: APS 35-37; English Level 6; Mathematics Level 6; Subject to place availability.

qualifications.name: Two-year LLB
notes: Minimum certificate type: National Senior Certificate Bachelor's degree pass.
Meeting the minimum requirements does not guarantee admission; final selection depends on places, academic results and other entry requirements.
School: School of Law.
APS requirement: No matric APS calculation.

Requirements: For graduates only; Subject to assessment criteria determined by the School of Law; Subject to place availability; Wits students who have completed a BA Law or BCom Law are eligible to apply.

qualifications.name: Three-year LLB
notes: Minimum certificate type: National Senior Certificate Bachelor's degree pass.
Meeting the minimum requirements does not guarantee admission; final selection depends on places, academic results and other entry requirements.
School: School of Law.
APS requirement: No matric APS calculation.

Requirements: For graduates only; Subject to assessment criteria determined by the School of Law; Subject to place availability; Applicants with an undergraduate degree from an institution other than Wits may be required to apply for this programme; Wits students who completed an undergraduate degree without Law majors are required to apply for this programme; Applicants must have obtained an average of at least 65% for the final year of their undergraduate degree.

qualifications.name: Four-year LLB
notes: Minimum certificate type: National Senior Certificate Bachelor's degree pass.
Meeting the minimum requirements does not guarantee admission; final selection depends on places, academic results and other entry requirements.
School: School of Law.
Waitlisting: eligible: True; criteria: APS 40-45; English Level 6; Mathematics Level 5 OR Maths Literacy Level 6; Subject to place availability.
